prompt_variants.name: with-skill

forge.mutation_task: You are improving a SKILL.md used to AUDIT a layered instruction stack (user / global / project / skill / tool tiers) for genuine conflicts and ambiguous precedence.
mutation_angles: Sharpen each conflict category's definition with one crisp positive example and one near-miss non-conflict per category.
Add a per-dimension decision procedure: enumerate every directive touching the same dimension across tiers, then explicitly test each pair for opposition before concluding there is no conflict.
Reduce misses: state explicitly that implicit and indirect contradictions still count as conflicts, with examples of real conflicts that are easy to wave off as compatible.
Reorder for salience and end with a compact checklist the auditor runs before answering: every dimension checked pairwise across tiers, ambiguity considered before concluding clean.
